title: NXR Field (on-disk)
description: A single signal defined ON a manifold. The subject store's `field/` group holds one or more named field instances (e.g. field/activation, field/curvature), each conforming to this kind. A field is identified by {kind: scalar|vector, domain: vertex|edge|face} and may be time-varying and/or complex. This is the unifier for source-time-courses, eigenmode-coefficient reconstructions, flow/Helmholtz outputs, and derived scalar maps. The in-memory compute operations in nxr-compute's field.schema.json (gradient, divergence, isolines, streamlines, hodge, poisson) are NOT persisted here — only attributes + values.

dims.D: domain element count = V (vertex) | E (edge) | F (face), per attributes.domain
dims.T: number of time frames (time-varying fields only)

manifold_ref.description: Reference to the host manifold: '<schema>:<id>' or a path like './manifold'.

time_varying.description: If true, values gains a leading T (frame) axis.

complex.description: If true, values gains a trailing [re, im] axis (storage complex_interleaved).

values.description: Field buffer. Rank/dtype selected by sibling attributes: scalar->[D], vector->[D,3]; time_varying prepends T (frame-major [T,D]/[T,D,3]). STATIC fields are float64; TIME-VARYING fields are float32 frame-major (per-frame upload contiguous). COMPLEX fields append a trailing 2 ([...,2]) with storage complex_interleaved. (Legacy nxr.stc@1.0 used [V,T] vertex-major float32 — migrate to frame-major [T,V].)
